footer.adDisclosure: Alfora is free and may receive voluntary contributions to continue growing.

contact.title: Contact Alfora
contact.description: Thank you for contacting us. This space is designed for you to share news, ideas, suggestions or difficulties related to the platform. Every message helps us care for and improve Alfora so it can remain a useful tool for everyone.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help
contact.mailtoNotice: Your device's configured email application will open when you continue.

donations.title: Support Alfora's growth
donations.description: Alfora is completely free because we sincerely want these tools to be useful in your work, helping you create with joy and develop your gifts while giving thanks to God. Voluntary contributions help us maintain the platform, improve its services and continue building new tools. Every contribution, regardless of size, is a great encouragement for us to keep moving forward.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.processingText: Whenever technically possible, files are processed directly in the user's browser and are not sent to Alfora's servers.
privacy.dataText: Alfora only receives information that the user chooses to communicate by email or through other enabled channels.
privacy.analyticsText: The platform may use analytics, hosting, security or external content services. These providers may process technical data such as IP address, browser, device and pages visited.
privacy.contactText: For privacy-related questions, use the platform's contact form.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.acceptanceText: By using Alfora, you accept these terms and agree to use the platform responsibly and in accordance with the law.
terms.serviceText: Alfora provides free creative tools. Features may be changed, updated, suspended or removed when necessary.
terms.userContentText: Users remain responsible for the files and content they process, including having the necessary rights to use them.
terms.prohibitedText: The platform may not be used for illegal, harmful or fraudulent activities, or to infringe the rights of others.
terms.warrantyText: The platform is provided as is. Although we aim to keep it available and secure, we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation on every device.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.whatText: Cookies and similar technologies are small pieces of data stored on a device to remember preferences and enable certain functions.
cookies.essentialText: Alfora may use local storage or essential cookies to remember preferences such as the selected language.
cookies.externalText: Analytics, hosting, embedded content or donation services may use their own cookies according to their policies.
cookies.controlText: You can remove or block cookies through your browser settings. Some features may stop remembering your preferences.
